---
name: Feature request
about: A new capability or a meaningful enhancement to an existing one.
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: [enhancement, needs-triage]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What user or operational problem does this solve? Be specific — "useful" is not a problem statement.

## Proposed change

What you would build. Reference modules and data flows from `ARCHITECTURE.md` where relevant.

## Alternatives considered

What else you thought about, and why this is better. If you have not considered alternatives yet, say so.

## Decision impact

- [ ] Touches a load-bearing technical decision; a new ADR is required.
- [ ] Module boundaries shift; `ARCHITECTURE.md` will need an update.
- [ ] Adds a new operational concern; a runbook is required.
- [ ] None of the above — internal change with no doc impact.

## Roadmap fit

Which phase in `ROADMAP.md` does this belong to? If this proposes pulling work forward from a later phase, justify briefly.

## Out of scope

What this issue explicitly does not include. Helps reviewers and avoids scope creep at PR time.
